mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND lesson_id = #{lessonId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM note WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
